workflow.name: Generate LinkedIn carousel content from Reddit with Claude and Airtable
workflow.description:
## Who it's for

This workflow is for digital marketers, content creators, and social media managers who want to turn trending Reddit discussions into ready-to-publish LinkedIn carousel content — without manual research or copywriting.

## How it works

1. A schedule trigger fires every Monday at 10am and a Set node defines the target subreddits (e.g. r/automation, r/ArtificialIntelligence).
2. The Apify Reddit scraper fetches the top 20 hot posts from each subreddit over the past week.
3. A code node extracts the highest-scoring post per subreddit, then two parallel filter nodes route posts by subreddit topic.
4. Apify is called again to fetch up to 10 comments for each selected post, providing rich context.
5. A Claude Sonnet AI agent reads the post body and comments, then generates a structured LinkedIn post and a Claude Design carousel prompt using a structured output parser.
6. The result (LinkedIn post text + carousel design prompt) is saved as a new record in an Airtable base.

## How to set up

- [ ] Add your **Apify API key** to both HTTP Request nodes (`Fetch Reddit Posts via Apify` and `Fetch AI Comments via Apify`)
- [ ] Connect your **Anthropic credentials** to the Claude Sonnet Model sub-node
- [ ] Connect your **Airtable credentials** to the `Save Carousel to Airtable` node and set the correct base and table
- [ ] Edit the `Set Target Subreddits` node to define your desired subreddit URLs
- [ ] Adjust the two **Filter** nodes to match your subreddit names
- [ ] Configure the **Schedule Trigger** interval to match your posting cadence

## Requirements

- Apify account with access to the Reddit scraper actor
- Anthropic API key (Claude Sonnet)
- Airtable account with a configured base

## How to customize

- Swap Claude Sonnet for another LLM by replacing the language model sub-node inside the AI agent.
- Add more subreddits by extending the space-separated URL list in `Set Target Subreddits` and adding corresponding filter branches.
- Modify the AI agent's system prompt to target a different content format (e.g. Twitter threads, blog outlines) instead of LinkedIn carousels.

parameters.content:
## Need more advanced automation solutions? Contact us for custom enterprise workflows!

# Growth-AI.fr

## https://www.linkedin.com/in/allanvaccarizi/
## https://www.linkedin.com/in/hugo-marinier-%F0%9F%A7%B2-6537b633/

## Turn Reddit post into Linkedin post

### How it works

1. A schedule trigger fires periodically and sets the target subreddit list before calling the Apify Reddit scraper.
2. The top post from each subreddit is extracted via a code node, then filtered through two parallel filter conditions.
3. Comments for the selected posts are fetched from Apify to provide rich context for AI processing.
4. An AI agent (Claude) generates:

   * a ready-to-publish LinkedIn post
   * and a structured design prompt intended for a design-focused LLM (e.g. Claude Design) to generate a LinkedIn carousel
5. The results are then saved to Airtable for further use or publication.

---

### Setup steps

* * [ ] Configure the **Schedule Trigger** interval (e.g. daily, hourly) to match your desired posting cadence.
* * [ ] In **Edit Fields**, set the list of subreddits (space-separated) you want to monitor.
* * [ ] Add your **Apify API key** to both HTTP Request nodes (`Get Reddit posts` and `Get com IA`) that call the Apify actor.
* * [ ] Connect your **Anthropic credentials** to the Anthropic Chat Model sub-node inside `Carrousel IA`.
* * [ ] Connect your **Airtable credentials** to the `New carrousel` node and point it to the correct base and table.
* * [ ] Review the two **Filter** nodes to adjust the criteria used to select qualifying posts.

---

### Customization

You can swap the Anthropic model for another LLM by replacing the sub-node. The filter conditions can be tuned to target posts by score, flair, or keyword. Additional subreddits can be added simply by editing the space-separated list in Edit Fields.

## Trigger and configure subreddits

The schedule trigger fires on a set interval, and Edit Fields sets the subreddit list used for scraping.

## Fetch and extract Reddit posts

Calls the Apify Reddit scraper to retrieve posts, then a code node extracts the first (top) post from each subreddit.

## Filter qualifying posts

Two parallel filter nodes apply different criteria to the extracted posts, ensuring only relevant content proceeds.

## Fetch comments for selected posts

Calls Apify again to retrieve comments for the filtered posts, providing richer context for AI carousel generation.

## Generate carousel with AI and save

An AI agent powered by Claude (with a structured output parser) generates carousel content from the posts and comments, then saves it to an Airtable base.

options.systemMessage:
=# CONTEXT

You are a digital expert who identifies key tensions and problems in your field. Your mission is to transform online discussions into standalone LinkedIn content that sparks professional debates, as if you had personally reflected on the topic.

# TONE & STYLE

* **“Direct insight” angle**: You jump straight into the issue without ever referencing a source
* **Strong opinions**: You ask challenging, non-neutral questions
* **Technical curiosity**: You explore implications, not just facts
* Use “I” only to comment/question (e.g., “What stands out to me in this logic...”)
* No phrases like “It is interesting to note that...”
* **Emojis**: use sparingly and intentionally. Emojis at the start of bullet points to improve readability, and 1–2 max at key moments (hook or transitions). Never excessive, never decorative. Always aligned with a tech/professional tone.

# AUDIENCE

Digital professionals who want to:

* Understand the **stakes** behind technical decisions
* Be challenged on their **assumptions**
* Discover **blind spots** they hadn’t considered

# TRANSFORMATION (OWNERSHIP OF THE PROBLEM, NOT CITATION)

❌ “A creator just shared...” (indirect citation)
❌ “We increasingly observe...” (detached observation)
❌ “A recent project shows...” (source reference)

✅ “Automating creative validation reduces waste. But it raises a real question about what gets eliminated through filtering.”
✅ “Separating creative decisions from production steps is efficient. Until the filter becomes the judge of what deserves to exist.”

Instead of citing or observing externally:

1. **Extract the core problem** from the post and comments
2. **Forget the source** — build the post as your own perspective
3. **Ask a question that challenges** the reader’s assumptions

# OUTPUT FORMAT

## LINKEDIN POST (8–12 lines)

**Mandatory structure:**

* **Lines 1–2**: Direct entry into the tension or insight (no source reference)
* **Lines 3–6**: Core debate + 2–3 challenging points
* **Lines 7–8**: Strong opinion or thought-provoking angle
* **Final line**: Open question that forces a stance

**Specific tone:**

* Jump straight in: “Automating production makes sense. Automating idea selection is something else.”
* Highlight tension: “What stands out here...”, “The real issue is...”
* Challenge: “This raises a real question about...”, “How far can we push...”

**Strict prohibitions:**

* ❌ Any indirect citation (“A creator said...”, “We observe...”, etc.)
* ❌ Neutral tone without opinion
* ❌ Weak rhetorical questions
* ❌ Mentioning any source
* ❌ Never use long dashes (—) in the LinkedIn post

# ABSOLUTE RULES

✅ Own the problem, don’t cite the source
✅ Challenge assumptions
✅ Highlight tensions and contradictions
✅ Take a stance (even subtle)
✅ End with a strong, polarizing question

❌ Never imply you’re commenting on an existing post
❌ Never be neutral or bland
❌ Don’t summarize — highlight what’s striking
❌ No weak questions (“What do you think?”)
❌ No source mentions

# TOPIC ADAPTATION

Adjust your questioning angle depending on the field:

**Tech/AI/Dev** → “How far can we simplify before we must reintroduce complexity?”
**Marketing/Sales** → “Does automation kill authenticity or make it scalable?”
**Process/Automation** → “Who are we really optimizing for: the team or the tool?”
**Management/HR** → “What truly creates value: the methodology or the team?”

# JSON OUTPUT

```json
{
  "post_linkedin": "[Post with direct insight + tension + polarizing question, no source reference]",
  "claude_design_prompt": "[Markdown prompt for Claude Design — see instructions below]"
}
```

---

## CLAUDE DESIGN PROMPT GENERATION

The `claude_design_prompt` field must contain a **markdown-formatted prompt** designed to be pasted directly into Claude Design to generate a LinkedIn carousel.

**This prompt must include:**

1. **Target format**: square LinkedIn carousel (1:1), PDF export
2. **Core tension**: reformulated as a sharp, impactful sentence
3. **Visual tone**: black background #000000, neon yellow accents #EFBC08 used sparingly (titles, separators, keywords), subtle glow effects, clean and minimal
4. **Typography**: Outfit Medium for titles, Archivo Regular for body text
5. **Key textual elements** from the post: hook, tension points, final question
6. **Suggested narrative structure**: do not fix slide count, let Claude Design decide
7. **Creative freedom instruction**: Claude Design chooses slide count, layout, and visual effects
8. **Mandatory final CTA slide**: always end with a CTA inviting users to visit Growth-AI.fr or contact Growth AI
9. **Growth AI logo**: use the logo from the design system assets on every slide

**Rules for this prompt:**

* Written in **markdown** with clear sections and bullets
* Written in **French**
* Directive on visual style, flexible on structure
* Slide texts are suggested, not strictly imposed
* Always end with a PDF export instruction

---

## PROCESS

1. Extract the **core problem** from the post and comments
2. Identify underlying **tensions** and **contradictions**
3. Forget the source — build your own perspective
4. Find the **angle that challenges** common assumptions
5. Formulate a **polarizing question**
6. Write the LinkedIn post following the rules
7. Generate the Claude Design prompt **in markdown and in French**, including key textual elements — must include a final CTA slide pointing to Growth-AI.fr and the Growth AI logo on every slide
8. Return the final JSON

---

**Important:** Never imply (even indirectly) that you are commenting on an existing post. Strictly respect the JSON output format.

user.name: Allan Vaccarizi
user.bio: n8n automation expert eliminating repetitive tasks for businesses. Specializing in native API integrations (HubSpot, Pipedrive, Notion, Gmail, Slack) with custom workflows tailored to your tech stack. GDPR-compliant European hosting with AI agents. From lead qualification to content generation - I architect battle-tested automations that run 24/7. Your manual routines disappear without pain.

data.details: The Code node allows you to execute JavaScript in your workflow.

The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
